description: All zones within the given range are reflected across the plane. Note that group information is copied from the original to the new zones.

6.0.description: All zones within the given range are reflected across the plane. Note that group information is copied from the original to the new zones.

keywords.name: dip-direction
keywords.description: This specifies the dip direction f [degrees] of the plane measured in the global xy-plane clockwise from the positive y-axis. (The default is f = 0.)

keywords.name: dip
keywords.description: This specifies the dip angle f [degrees] of the plane, measured in the negative z-direction from the global xy-plane. (The default is f = 0.)

keywords.name: normal
keywords.description: This specifies a normal vector to the plane, with the components specified as v. If normal is specified, dip and dip-direction are not required.

keywords.name: origin
keywords.description: This specifies the location of one point through which the plane crosses. The coordinates of the point are v.

keywords.name: merge
keywords.description: If b is off, then boundary gridpoints of the newly created zones are not automatically merged with previous existing gridpoints. By default merge is on.

keywords.description: Specify the dip direction f [degrees] of the plane measured in the global \(xy\) -plane clockwise from the positive \(y\) -axis. (The default is f = 0.)

keywords.name: dip
keywords.description: Specify (in FLAC3D ) the dip angle f [degrees] of the plane, measured in the negative \(z\) -direction from the global \(xy\) -plane. (The default is f = 0.) In FLAC2D , this specifies the angle f [degrees] of the plane measured clockwise from the global \(x\) -axis. (The default is f = 0.)
